title: selaginella pennata
intro: Selaginella pennata, also known as Spikemoss, is a type of evergreen, epiphytic plant belonging to the Selaginellaceae family. Traditionally, it has been used in various cultures for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant has been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems, as well as to promote wound healing and reduce inflammation. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the Selaginella pennata plant are commonly used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal benefits.
